options.incomeFromJobs: Income from all jobs you do

hasAppliedForUniversalCredit.label: Have you applied for Universal Credit?

universalCreditApplicationDate.label: When did you apply for Universal Credit?

priorityDebts.label: Do you have any priority debts?

regularExpenses.label: What other regular expenses do you have?

options.householdBills: Household bills (for example, council tax, gas, electricity, water, internet)
options.schoolCosts: School costs (for example, uniform and school dinners)

otherConsiderations.label: Is there anything else you want to tell the court as part of your response?

otherConsiderationsDetails.label: Give details about what else you want to tell the court
